snippets.name: ACF flexible content loop
snippets.description: Loop through an ACF flexible content field with layout checks
snippets.body:
<?php if ( have_rows( '${1:flexible_field}' ) ) : ?>
    <?php while ( have_rows( '${1:flexible_field}' ) ) : the_row(); ?>

        <?php if ( is_row_layout( '${2:layout_one}' ) ) : ?>
            $0
        <?php elseif ( is_row_layout( '${3:layout_two}' ) ) : ?>

        <?php endif; ?>

    <?php endwhile; ?>
<?php endif; ?>
